Appearance
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

This is part of the list of Nintendo Switch games.

List

[edit]

There are currently 4090 games across List of Nintendo Switch games (0–9), List of Nintendo Switch games (A–Am), this page (An–Az), List of Nintendo Switch games (B), List of Nintendo Switch games (C–G), List of Nintendo Switch games (H–P), and List of Nintendo Switch games (Q–Z).

This is a dynamic list and may never be able to satisfy particular standards for completeness. You can help by editing the page to add missing items, with references to reliable sources.
  • 0–9
  • A–Am

  789. ^ "Ayo the Clown (Switch eShop)". Nintendo Life. August 5, 2021. Retrieved November 9, 2021.

  792. ^ "Aztech: Forgotten Gods launches March 10". Gematsu. January 25, 2022. Retrieved January 27, 2022.

  794. ^ "Azuran Tales: TRIALS". Nintendo of America. Retrieved November 9, 2021.
